label: Special Relativity
description: Einstein publishes the special theory of relativity, revolutionising physics.

label: Titanic sinks
description: RMS Titanic sinks in the North Atlantic on its maiden voyage.

label: WWI begins
description: World War I begins following the assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand.

label: General Relativity
description: Einstein presents the field equations of general relativity.

label: WWI ends
description: Armistice signed — World War I ends after four years of conflict.

label: Penicillin discovered
description: Alexander Fleming discovers penicillin, launching the era of antibiotics.

label: WWII begins
description: Germany invades Poland — World War II begins.

label: WWII ends
description: Japan surrenders — World War II ends after six years.

label: United Nations founded
description: The United Nations is established to promote international cooperation.

label: Transistor invented
description: Shockley, Bardeen & Brattain invent the transistor at Bell Labs.

label: DNA structure discovered
description: Watson & Crick describe the double-helix structure of DNA.

label: Sputnik launched
description: The Soviet Union launches Sputnik 1 — the first artificial Earth satellite.

label: First human in space
description: Yuri Gagarin becomes the first human to travel into space.

label: Berlin Wall built
description: Construction of the Berlin Wall begins, dividing East and West Berlin.

label: JFK assassinated
description: US President John F. Kennedy is assassinated in Dallas, Texas.

label: Moon landing
description: Apollo 11: Neil Armstrong & Buzz Aldrin become the first humans on the Moon.

label: ARPANET goes online
description: The first message is sent over ARPANET, the precursor to the internet.

label: Microsoft founded
description: Bill Gates and Paul Allen found Microsoft.

label: Apple founded
description: Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak and Ronald Wayne found Apple Computer.

label: IBM PC launched
description: IBM launches the Personal Computer, transforming computing.

label: Berlin Wall falls
description: The Berlin Wall falls — a pivotal moment in the end of the Cold War.

label: Hubble Space Telescope
description: The Hubble Space Telescope is launched into low Earth orbit.

label: World Wide Web public
description: Tim Berners-Lee makes the World Wide Web publicly available.

label: USSR dissolved
description: The Soviet Union officially ceases to exist, ending the Cold War.

label: Dolly the sheep cloned
description: Dolly becomes the first mammal cloned from an adult somatic cell.

label: Google founded
description: Larry Page and Sergey Brin incorporate Google.

label: ISS first module launched
description: Zarya, the first module of the International Space Station, is launched.

label: September 11 attacks
description: Terrorist attacks in the US kill nearly 3,000 people.

label: Wikipedia launched
description: Wikipedia, the free online encyclopaedia, is launched.

label: Human Genome completed
description: The Human Genome Project declares the sequence of human DNA essentially complete.

label: Facebook founded
description: Mark Zuckerberg launches Facebook from his Harvard dorm room.

label: Mars rovers land
description: Spirit & Opportunity land on Mars, beginning years of surface exploration.

label: YouTube launched
description: YouTube is founded, democratising video sharing.

label: iPhone launched
description: Apple unveils the first iPhone, beginning the smartphone era.

label: Global Financial Crisis
description: Lehman Brothers collapses, triggering the worst financial crisis since 1929.

label: Bitcoin launched
description: Satoshi Nakamoto mines the Bitcoin genesis block.

label: Higgs boson discovered
description: CERN announces the discovery of a particle consistent with the Higgs boson.

label: Curiosity lands on Mars
description: NASA's Curiosity rover successfully lands in Gale Crater on Mars.

label: AlphaGo beats world champion
description: DeepMind's AlphaGo defeats Lee Sedol, the world's top Go player.

label: Gravitational waves detected
description: LIGO announces the first direct detection of gravitational waves.

label: Brexit vote
description: The United Kingdom votes to leave the European Union.

label: New Horizons reaches Pluto
description: NASA's New Horizons spacecraft makes its closest approach to Pluto.

label: First black hole image
description: The Event Horizon Telescope captures the first image of a black hole.

label: COVID-19 pandemic declared
description: WHO declares COVID-19 a global pandemic.

label: Perseverance lands on Mars
description: NASA's Perseverance rover lands in Jezero Crater, beginning the search for ancient life.

label: ChatGPT launched
description: OpenAI releases ChatGPT, igniting mainstream interest in generative AI.

label: James Webb first images
description: NASA releases the first full-colour images from the James Webb Space Telescope.

label: GPT-4 released
description: OpenAI releases GPT-4, a major leap in large language model capabilities.

label: Artemis II crewed flight
description: NASA's Artemis II sends astronauts around the Moon for the first time since Apollo 17.
